manifest_description.message: Use your favorite text editor to compose emails in Thunderbird

manifest_commands_start_ghostbird_descri.message: Start syncing with the text editor
manifest_commands_start_ghostbird_descri.description: Description of the shortcut key to start Ghostbird

manifest_commands_stop_ghostbird_descrip.message: End syncing with the text editor (Set the same keys as Start to toggle)
manifest_commands_stop_ghostbird_descrip.description: Description of the shortcut key to stop Ghostbird
